ddls:
CREATE TABLE "doctors" (
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each doctor */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the doctor */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the doctor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the doctor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the doctor */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization area of the doctor (e.g., cardiology, neurology) */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the doctor */,
  "license_expiration_date" TEXT /* License expiration date of the doctor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education record */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Degree obtained by the doctor (e.g., MBBS, PhD) */,
  "institute" TEXT /* Name of the institution where the degree was obtained */,
  "year_of_completion" INTEGER /* Year the degree was completed */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor associated with this education record */,
  "degree_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of degree (e.g., undergraduate, postgraduate) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the education program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the education program */,
  "gpa" TEXT /* GPA (Grade Point Average) of the doctor in the education program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_degree_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("degree_type_id") REFERENCES deg_types ("degree_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the institution */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of institution (e.g., Medical College, University) */,
  "accreditation_status" TEXT /* Accreditation status of the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "certifications" (
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certification */,
  "certification_name" TEXT /* Name of the certification obtained by the doctor */,
  "issuing_organization" TEXT /* Organization that issued the certification */,
  "date_issued" TEXT /* Date when the certification was issued */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor associated with this certification */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the certification expires */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date when the certification needs to be renewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certifications_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deg_types" (
  "degree_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each degree type */,
  "degree_name" TEXT /* Name of the degree type (e.g., MBBS, PhD) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the degree type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("degree_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specializations" (
  "specialization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specialization */,
  "specialization_name" TEXT /* Name of the specialization (e.g., Cardiology, Pediatrics) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the specialization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specialization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Staff, Doctor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system access */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for authentication */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_verification" (
  "verification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each verification request */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor whose education is being verified */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the verification request was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the verification request (e.g., Pending, Completed) */,
  "verified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who verified the education */,
  "verified_date" TEXT /* Date when the education was verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("verification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_verification_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "doctor_specialization" (
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor */,
  "specialization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specialization assigned to the doctor */,
  "primary_specialization" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the primary specialization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doctor_id", "specialization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity affected by the action */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity affected by the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "certification_renewals" (
  "renewal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each renewal record */,
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the certification being renewed */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date when the certification was renewed */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the renewed certification expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("renewal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certification_renewals_certification_id FOREIGN KEY ("certification_id") REFERENCES certifications ("certification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "education_id" INTEGER /* ID of the education record associated with the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., degree certificate, transcript) */,
  "document_file" TEXT /* File containing the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_documents_education_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_id") REFERENCES education ("education_id")
)
